name: AZB & Partners
notes: Tier 1 Indian law firm. One of the largest Capital Markets practices in India. Routinely advises on IPOs, QIPs, rights issues, and debt capital markets.

name: Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas
notes: Tier 1 Indian law firm. Largest law firm in India by headcount. Dominant Capital Markets and M&A practice. Successor to Amarchand Mangaldas.

name: Khaitan & Co
notes: Tier 1 Indian law firm. Strong Capital Markets and private equity practice. Known for rigorous internship selection process.

name: Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas
notes: Tier 1 Indian law firm. Strong Capital Markets practice. Split from Cyril Amarchand Mangaldas.

name: S&R Associates
notes: Tier 1 Indian law firm. Boutique focus on Capital Markets and M&A. High quality transactional work.

name: Latham & Watkins
notes: Top global law firm. India practice focuses on cross-border Capital Markets transactions.

name: Trilegal
notes: Tier 2 Indian law firm. Strong transactional practice including Capital Markets.

name: Luthra and Luthra Law Offices
notes: Tier 2 Indian law firm. Established Capital Markets practice.

name: JSA Advocates & Solicitors
notes: Tier 2 Indian law firm. Active Capital Markets practice.

name: L&L Partners
notes: Tier 2 Indian law firm. Formerly Lall Lahiri & Salhotra. Capital Markets and private equity work.

name: Argus Partners
notes: Tier 2 Indian law firm. Growing Capital Markets practice.

name: SEBI
notes: Securities and Exchange Board of India. Primary securities regulator. Internship here is the single strongest signal for Capital Markets interest and knowledge.

name: Reserve Bank of India
notes: Central bank. Regulates debt markets, foreign exchange, and banking. High relevance for CapM candidates interested in debt capital markets and FEMA.

name: National Stock Exchange
notes: Primary stock exchange. Internship directly relevant to listing, compliance, and market operations.

name: NSE
notes: National Stock Exchange — same as NSE. Abbreviation entry.

name: Bombay Stock Exchange
notes: Oldest stock exchange in Asia. Internship directly relevant to listing and Capital Markets.

name: BSE
notes: Bombay Stock Exchange — abbreviation entry.

name: IFSCA
notes: International Financial Services Centres Authority. Regulates GIFT City. Relevant for cross-border Capital Markets.

name: Kotak Investment Banking
notes: Leading domestic investment bank. IPO and QIP advisory.

name: JM Financial
notes: Leading domestic investment bank. Active in IPO and debt capital markets.

name: Axis Capital
notes: Axis Bank subsidiary. Active in equity capital markets.

name: Goldman Sachs
notes: Global investment bank. India operations focus on cross-border transactions.

name: Morgan Stanley
notes: Global investment bank. Active in India equity capital markets.

name: Nuvama Wealth Management
notes: Mid-tier investment bank. Active in SME IPOs and wealth management.

name: General Corporate Boutique
notes: Generic entry for small boutique firms with no established Capital Markets practice. Partial credit only if work described shows CapM exposure.
